prompt:

Find where Item 1A ends — right before the "Item 1C" heading if it appears, otherwise the very bottom of the last page — and transcribe VERBATIM the last 5 lines of Item 1A before that point. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
The WBD transaction may cause our financial results to differ from expectations, we may not achieve the anticipated benefits of the WBD transaction, and the WBD transaction may disrupt our current plans or operations.
The success of the WBD transaction will depend, in part, on our ability to successfully integrate the acquired businesses and realize the
anticipated benefits, including synergies. Difficulties in integrating the acquired businesses may result
